mapper.sql: id, productshortname, txamount, txdate, txtype, currency, beneficiary, interate, integain, startdate, enddate, remark
productshortname, txamount, txdate, txtype, currency, beneficiary, interate, integain, startdate, enddate, remark
mapper.select:
select l.beneficiary, l.subtotal, r.total, 100*(l.subtotal/r.total ) as ratio from ( SELECT PRODUCTSHORTNAME, BENEFICIARY, sum(TXAMOUNT) as subtotal
FROM PMJK_CASHFLOWDATA where productshortname = #{productshortname} and txtype='理财买入' group by PRODUCTSHORTNAME, BENEFICIARY ) l inner join ( SELECT PRODUCTSHORTNAME, sum(TXAMOUNT) as total FROM PMJK_CASHFLOWDATA where productshortname = #{productshortname} and txtype='理财买入' group by PRODUCTSHORTNAME ) r on l.productshortname = r.productshortname
